name: Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the egg whites, molasses, vanilla extract, wheat flour, cinnamon, and sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add the oatmeal to the mixture and stir until you have a batter-like consistency.
3. Cook the pancakes on a preheated griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat until golden brown on both sides.
